1. Aries - 8/10 - Natural born leaders, Aries are often bold and confident, but can be impulsive.
2. Taurus - 6/10 - Practical and reliable, Tauruses tend to be grounded, but can be stubborn.
3. Gemini - 9/10 - Curious and adaptable, Geminis are quick-witted, but may struggle with commitment.
4. Cancer - 7/10 - Emotionally intelligent and nurturing, Cancers are caring, but can be overly sensitive.
5. Leo - 8/10 - Confident and charismatic, Leos shine bright, but can be prideful.
6. Virgo - 5/10 - Analytical and hardworking, Virgos are diligent, but may worry excessively.
7. Libra - 9/10 - Diplomatic and social, Librans strive for balance, but can be indecisive.
8. Scorpio - 7/10 - Passionate and intense, Scorpios are perceptive, but may struggle with trust issues.
9. Sagittarius - 8/10 - Adventurous and optimistic, Sagittarians seek freedom, but can be reckless.
10. Capricorn - 6/10 - Disciplined and responsible, Capricorns aim high, but can be overly critical.
11. Aquarius - 9/10 - Humanitarian and independent, Aquarians are innovative, but may struggle with social connections.
12. Pisces - 8/10 - Empathetic and imaginative, Pisces dream big, but can be easily misled.
Note: The scores are subjective and based on general characteristics associated with each sign, not individual personalities.
